name: Kapuska (Sauerkraut) and Kielbasa
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pot, simmer sauerkraut with water until heated through.
2. Add sugar and optional ingredients (bay leaf, beer) to the pot.
3. Cook for about 20 minutes, stirring occasionally.
4. Add kielbasa to the pot and continue cooking until heated through.
5. Optional: Replace up to one-third of the sauerkraut with fresh cabbage if desired.
